purified water.name: Water (Aqua)
purified water.explanation: Universal solvent and base ingredient. Essential and safe for everyone.

water.name: Water (Aqua)
water.explanation: Universal solvent and base ingredient. Essential and safe for everyone.

glycerin.name: Glycerin
glycerin.explanation: Powerful humectant that draws moisture into skin. Excellent for dry skin.

hyaluronic-acid.name: Hyaluronic Acid
hyaluronic-acid.explanation: Holds 1000x its weight in water. Suitable for all skin types, non-comedogenic.

sodium-hyaluronate.name: Sodium Hyaluronate
sodium-hyaluronate.explanation: Salt form of hyaluronic acid. Penetrates deeper into skin layers.

niacinamide.name: Niacinamide
niacinamide.explanation: Vitamin B3. Regulates sebum, reduces inflammation, and improves skin tone.

salicylic-acid.name: Salicylic Acid
salicylic-acid.explanation: BHA that penetrates pores. Excellent for acne but can be drying.

retinol.name: Retinol
retinol.explanation: Vitamin A derivative. Powerful anti-aging but irritating. Start slowly.

retinal.name: Retinal (Retinaldehyde)
retinal.explanation: One step away from retinoic acid. More potent than retinol.

retinyl-palmitate.name: Retinyl Palmitate
retinyl-palmitate.explanation: Weakest retinoid form. Good for beginners but less effective.

vitamin-c.name: Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid)
vitamin-c.explanation: Powerful antioxidant. Use in AM with sunscreen for best results.

alpha arbutin.name: Alpha Arbutin
alpha arbutin.explanation: Gold standard for pigmentation. Safer than hydroquinone.

azelaic-acid.name: Azelaic Acid
azelaic-acid.explanation: Gentle multi-tasker. Safe for sensitive skin and pregnancy.

ceramide-np.name: Ceramide NP
ceramide-np.explanation: Essential lipid in skin barrier. Excellent for compromised skin.

ceramide-ap.name: Ceramide AP
ceramide-ap.explanation: Unique ceramide with mild exfoliating properties.

ceramide-eop.name: Ceramide EOP
ceramide-eop.explanation: Long-chain ceramide crucial for skin structure.

squalane.name: Squalane
squalane.explanation: Stable form of squalene. Perfect for all skin types, including oily.

panthenol.name: Panthenol (Pro-Vitamin B5)
panthenol.explanation: Converts to vitamin B5. Excellent for irritated or sensitive skin.

centella-asiatica.name: Centella Asiatica Extract
centella-asiatica.explanation: Cica/Tiger grass. Gold standard for sensitive and damaged skin.

zinc-oxide.name: Zinc Oxide
zinc-oxide.explanation: Physical sunscreen filter. Safe for sensitive skin and babies.

titanium-dioxide.name: Titanium Dioxide
titanium-dioxide.explanation: Mineral sunscreen. Safe but can leave white cast.

fragrance.name: Fragrance (Parfum)
fragrance.explanation: Common allergen. Can cause irritation, especially in sensitive skin.

alcohol-denat.name: Alcohol Denat
alcohol-denat.explanation: Drying alcohol. Avoid if you have dry or sensitive skin.

glycolic-acid.name: Glycolic Acid
glycolic-acid.explanation: AHA with smallest molecule. Effective but can irritate. Start slowly.

lactic-acid.name: Lactic Acid
lactic-acid.explanation: Gentler AHA than glycolic. Good for beginners.

benzoyl-peroxide.name: Benzoyl Peroxide
benzoyl-peroxide.explanation: Powerful acne treatment. Can bleach fabrics and be very drying.

sodium-lauryl-sulfate.name: Sodium Lauryl Sulfate (SLS)
sodium-lauryl-sulfate.explanation: Harsh surfactant. Strips natural oils. Avoid if you have dry skin.

cocamidopropyl-betaine.name: Cocamidopropyl Betaine
cocamidopropyl-betaine.explanation: Mild surfactant derived from coconut. Gentler than sulfates.

dimethicone.name: Dimethicone
dimethicone.explanation: Silicone that creates occlusive layer. May clog pores in acne-prone skin.

phenoxyethanol.name: Phenoxyethanol
phenoxyethanol.explanation: Common preservative. Generally safe but can irritate sensitive skin.

parabens.name: Parabens (Methylparaben, Propylparaben)
parabens.explanation: Controversial preservative. Generally safe but some prefer to avoid.

tea-tree-oil.name: Tea Tree Leaf Oil
tea-tree-oil.explanation: Natural antibacterial. Effective for acne but can be irritating.

kojic-acid.name: Kojic Acid
kojic-acid.explanation: Derived from fungi. Effective for pigmentation but can irritate.

tranexamic-acid.name: Tranexamic Acid
tranexamic-acid.explanation: Emerging ingredient for stubborn pigmentation. Very effective.

peptides.name: Peptides
peptides.explanation: Amino acid chains that signal collagen production.

adenosine.name: Adenosine
adenosine.explanation: Naturally occurring in skin. Proven anti-aging benefits.

bakuchiol.name: Bakuchiol
bakuchiol.explanation: Natural retinol alternative. Pregnancy-safe with similar benefits.

coenzyme-q10.name: Coenzyme Q10 (Ubiquinone)
coenzyme-q10.explanation: Natural antioxidant that declines with age.

green-tea-extract.name: Green Tea Extract
green-tea-extract.explanation: Rich in polyphenols. Calming and protective.

limonene.name: Limonene
limonene.explanation: Citrus fragrance component. Can cause sensitization.

linalool.name: Linalool
linalool.explanation: Common fragrance allergen. Can oxidize and irritate.

coconut-oil.name: Coconut Oil (Cocos Nucifera Oil)
coconut-oil.explanation: Highly comedogenic (pore-clogging). Avoid on face if acne-prone.

shea-butter.name: Shea Butter
shea-butter.explanation: Thick emollient. Excellent for dry skin but too heavy for oily.

jojoba-oil.name: Jojoba Oil
jojoba-oil.explanation: Technically a wax ester. Similar to skin's natural oils.

argan-oil.name: Argan Oil
argan-oil.explanation: Lightweight oil rich in antioxidants. May be too rich for oily skin.

rosehip-oil.name: Rosehip Seed Oil
rosehip-oil.explanation: Rich in vitamins A and C. Good for pigmentation but may be heavy.

avobenzone.name: Avobenzone
avobenzone.explanation: Chemical UVA filter. Can be unstable without stabilizers.

octinoxate.name: Octinoxate (Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate)
octinoxate.explanation: Common chemical filter. Concerns about hormone disruption.

oxybenzone.name: Oxybenzone
oxybenzone.explanation: Controversial filter. High absorption rate. Many prefer to avoid.

aloe-vera.name: Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice
aloe-vera.explanation: Cooling and calming. Excellent for sunburn and irritation.

chamomile.name: Chamomile Extract
chamomile.explanation: Gentle botanical. Good for reactive skin.

oat-extract.name: Oat Kernel Extract (Colloidal Oatmeal)
oat-extract.explanation: Excellent for compromised skin barrier. Dermatologist-recommended.

urea.name: Urea
urea.explanation: Humectant and keratolytic. Excellent for very dry, rough skin.

allantoin.name: Allantoin
allantoin.explanation: Gentle ingredient. Often paired with irritating actives to soothe.

bisabolol.name: Bisabolol
bisabolol.explanation: Derived from chamomile. Very gentle and soothing.

madecassoside.name: Madecassoside
madecassoside.explanation: Active component of Centella. Very effective for irritation.

glutathione.name: Glutathione
glutathione.explanation: help improve the look of discolorations and promote an even skin tone and help restore skin's barrier.

propanediol.name: Propanediol
propanediol.explanation: Humectant derived from corn that enhances ingredient penetration

butylene_glycol.name: Butylene Glycol
butylene_glycol.explanation: Humectant that helps retain moisture and improve spreadability

ethoxydiglycol.name: Ethoxydiglycol
caution: may increase irritation with strong actives
ethoxydiglycol.explanation: Solvent that helps active ingredients penetrate deeper

salicylic_acid.name: Salicylic Acid
salicylic_acid.explanation: BHA exfoliant that penetrates pores to remove excess oil

glycerin.name: Glycerin
glycerin.explanation: Powerful humectant that draws moisture into the skin

alpha_arbutin.name: Alpha Arbutin
alpha_arbutin.explanation: Gentle skin-lightening agent that reduces melanin production

centella_asiatica.name: Centella Asiatica Extract
centella_asiatica.explanation: Calming plant extract known for healing and anti-inflammatory properties

allantoin.name: Allantoin
allantoin.explanation: Skin protectant that promotes healing and softness

sodium_hyaluronate.name: Sodium Hyaluronate
sodium_hyaluronate.explanation: Salt form of hyaluronic acid that deeply hydrates skin

willow_bark_extract.name: Willow Bark Extract
willow_bark_extract.explanation: Natural source of salicylates that gently exfoliate

olive_oil.name: Olive Fruit Oil
olive_oil.explanation: Natural oil rich in fatty acids

safflower_oil.name: Safflower Seed Oil
safflower_oil.explanation: Non-greasy oil rich in linoleic acid

ethylhexylglycerin.name: Ethylhexylglycerin
ethylhexylglycerin.explanation: Enhances preservative efficacy and skin feel

fragrance.name: Fragrance / Parfum
fragrance.explanation: Added scent that may cause irritation in sensitive skin
